title: Send to a group
intro: Send one message (with a photo) to several contacts at once, filtered by type.
recipientsHint: Only contacts with an email, not unsubscribed. Those without an email are skipped automatically.
noRecipients: No contacts with an email in this group.
subjectPlaceholder: e.g. Lemon oil goes on sale tomorrow
messagePlaceholder: Write your update or offer here...
personalizeHint: Each contact receives the email with their first name in the greeting, automatically.
imageHint: Shown directly in the email, below the message. Max 3 MB; we compress it automatically.
imageErrType: Please choose an image (JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF).
imageErrSize: The photo is too large even after compression. Try a smaller one.
imageErrGeneric: Couldn't upload the photo. Please try again.
errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
confirmText: The message will be sent to {{count}} contacts. Unsubscribed ones are excluded automatically.
